title: UFOs and Altered States of Consciousness (feat. Graham Hancock)
summary: This interview explores the connection between UFOs and altered states of consciousness, featuring Graham Hancock discussing psychedelic experiences and entity encounters. The conversation touches on whether psychedelic visions relate to modern alien phenomena and government UFO disclosure efforts.

key_claims.claim: Pablo Amaringo, a Peruvian shaman, painted UFOs and flying saucers in his artwork based on his ayahuasca visions
Pablo Amaringo described the flying saucers in his paintings as 'vehicles for entering and leaving the spirit world'
There may be physical technology that can gain access to other realms of reality
